---
title: "21 Summary Report"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Intent: create final all-star table combining stock and dividend strength.
# This should return top 3 overall based on lowest combined rank.
all_star <- overall_table %>%
  mutate(rank_sum = stock_rank + div_rank) %>%
  arrange(rank_sum, desc(overall_score)) %>%
  slice(1:3)

# Intent: render as a polished table for the final report.
knitr::kable(all_star,
  caption = "Top 3 DJIA All-Stars: Price + Dividend Performance",
  digits = 3
)
```
